titleStmt.title: SII 9.670: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 670. (A.R. No. 510 of 1914.) ON A SLAB IN A FIELD TO THE NORTH OF THE VILLAGE CHATRADAHALLI, HADAGALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1481, Siddhārthi, Jyēshṭha, ba. 7 corresponding to A.D. 1559 May 28 Sunday (not verifiable), in the reign of Sadāśiva-Mahārāya. It records that the Gauḍas and others of the village Chhatradahaḷḷi, which was a mānya of the god Mālyavanta-Raghunāthadēva, made a gift of a field in the village for filling up a charity water-trough with water by means of a charity water-lift. It records also that the Upāṟas (named) of the village made a gift on the same date of a fixed quantity of salt for the man lifting water from the well for the charity watertrough. It further records that the iron-smiths of the village (named) agreed to supply an iron bucket to bale out water for the charity water-trough. Certain Gauḍas (named) of the village are stated to have made a gift of the toddy-palm trees, in the area defined, to the person lifting water for the charity water-trough.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī śubhamastu . svasti śrījayādyudayaśālivāhanaśakavaru
ṣa 1481 ne śrīmatu sidhārthisaṁvacharada jēṣṭha ba 7 lū śrīmaṁ
numahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrāpratāpa śrīvī
rasadāśivamahārāyarū ratnasiṁhāsanaṟūḍhanāgi prithivīrā
jyaṁgaiutiralāgi śrīmālyavaṁta raghunāthadēvara Amrutapaḍi
ge saluva chatradahaḷiya rāyapagauḍaru busaṇagauḍaru jeḍagaṇa
gauḍaru sēnabhōva narasapanu prajegaḷu koṭa dharmaētada ḍōṇige
nīrahoyivadake koṭa silāśāsanada dānaśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare nāu
naṁma grāmake dharmaḍōṇige nīra hoyivadake Urige paḍuvalu
Aladamarana paṭiyanu dharmaĒtada nīra yetuvadake nāu sa
rvamānyavāgi biṭeU yi darmake Āvanobanu tappidare taṁdetāyanu
vāraṇasili koṁda pātakake hōharū gōbrāhmara koṁda pātakake hō
haru mata tappidare kate tuṁṇi tiṁdu kaḷa kuḍidaru śrī śrī śrī

sidhdhārthisaṁvacharada jēṣṭha ba 7 lu śrīmatu sāga
rakulake ciṁtāmaṇigaḷu Upāṟabōugaḷu ceḍa
galabōva rāmalabōva bukebōva yivaru muṁtāda bō
Ugaḷu darmaḍōṇige nīra Etuvanige mōḷe voṁdake yibaḷa Upi
na lekadalu biṭu koṭeU yi dharmake Āvanobanu tapidare kate tu
ṁṇe tiṁda kaḷa kuḍidavaru śrī . sidhārthisaṁvatarada jēṣṭha ba 7 lu
śrīmatu kāḷakādēvi kamaṭēśvara dēvara varaprasādigaḷādaṁthā sōmala Ē
llōja gaṭa tiṁmōja gopulapali mallōja yivaru muṁtāda vō
jugaḷu dharmaḍōṇige nīra Etuva kabinada Ētada bāne kabinada ka
ṭṭu yiṣṭaṁ dharmavanu tapade naḍasi bāheU yi dharmake Āvanāno
bba tapidare kate tuṁṇe tiṁdu kaḷa kuḍidavaru śrī śrī śrī
sidhārthisaṁvacharada jēṣṭa ba 7 lu śrīmatu yīḷigarā pedigau
ḍana maga mācagauḍa mallagauḍa pāvirāla tipagauḍa cikakana
kagauḍa bacāyikanakagauḍaru kācagauḍa cikavōbagauḍa
yivaru muṁtāda prajegaḷu nāu dharmaḍōṇige nīra yetuva
nige Aṁṇagaḷakuṁṭevoḷagaṇa �yocalamaranū biṭṭukoṭṭeU
yidakke mere Aṁṇagaḷa kuṁbe mēreyāgi kaḍamalakaṭe sīme mēre
yāgi yiṣṭanu biṭakoṭṭeU yī dharmake Avanānū
bbanu tapidare ṭamadēvarāṇe mate tappidare kate tuṁṇi
tiṁdu kaḷa kuḍidavaru śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.670 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
